Vault
FeaturesPricingTemplatesDocs
Vault — FCA-regulated

The business account
that respects your time.

Multi-currency, instant payouts, no monthly fee. For UK-incorporated teams.

Multi-currency
Hold GBP, EUR, USD in one account.
Instant payouts
SEPA Instant, Faster Payments, SWIFT.
API-first
Full API coverage and webhooks.
Features

Built for teams that ship.

A11y
WCAG 2.1 AA across all pages.
Animations
60fps, reduced-motion aware.
SEO
OpenGraph, JSON-LD, sitemap.
Analytics
Umami/Plausible-ready.
Components
40+ reusable sections.
Visual Breakpoints
Desktop, tablet, mobile.
